derivation_notes.key_format: tagName(1 byte, first char of tag name) || tagValue(variable bytes) || created_at(8 bytes LE)
derivation_notes.levid_location: VALUE field (8-byte LE uint64) of each index entry
derivation_notes.sort_semantics: tagName+tagValue prefix compared by memcmp (length-then-bytes, like mdb_cmp_memn); created_at compared NUMERICALLY (golpe LE uint64, not memcmp).
derivation_notes.events_with_tags: Only 3 of 11 events have tags: levIds 6, 8, 11. All three use the same tag: ['e', 'aaaa...aa'] (64 hex 'a' chars). LevIds 6 and 8 are the adversarial pair (ts=1700000255 vs ts=1700000256). LevId 11 is at ts=1720000000.

adversarial_demonstration.pair: levId=6 at ts=1700000255 (adv_low) and levId=8 at ts=1700000256 (adv_high), both with tag e=aaaa...aa
adversarial_demonstration.memcmp_wrong_order: ts_adv_high LE (00f2...) < ts_adv_low LE (fff1...) — memcmp inverts order
